name: David Zinsner
background: David A. Zinsner has been Intel’s Executive Vice President and CFO since January 2022. Before joining Intel, he was Executive Vice President and CFO at Micron Technology, Inc. from 2018 to 2022. He also served as President and COO of Affirmed Networks and held CFO roles at Analog Devices and Intersil Corp.

company_affiliations.name: Intel Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
